Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'm in Shinagawa Dungeon...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maya isn't in the area...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_000_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A mysterious light engulfs Tatsuya![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A gray-colored sky stretches[n]as far as the eye can see.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A barren wasteland lies before me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maya is staring into the distance...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 17005 0 0}i saw u log on so i brought u here w/ magic. sry ^^;[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maya seems troubled.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 17005 0 0}{f 5 13 10 5 1}no tatsuya, if u keep being nice i won't ever move fwd =S[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maya seems a little happier.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 17005 0 0}remember how i said i would send our chat log to the admins before? ＞_＞[cr][n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maya seems genuinely sorry.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maya seems nervous.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}She's fidgeting in the sand with her feet...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 17004 0 0}i read over our chat log and i didnt like waht i saw =/[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}what kind fo person plays an MMO jus to bitch about coworkers? -_-[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 17005 0 0}u shouldnt have had to put up w/ me doin that. im sry m(_ _)m[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 17002 0 0}i kno it'll look like i'm chickening out an stuff, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}im thinkin bout quittin the MMO today. i... dun think i'll c u again T_T[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 17005 0 0}yea... sry, i kno ive never been gud w/ this kind of thing...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maya seems sad.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maya seems happy.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 17005 0 0}since no1 can see my face on teh intarwebs, i said some p mean stuff... ^^;[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}so i jus have to look @ myself in the mirror and make it rite! ^_^[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}shyeah rite. =P i never woulda figured this out w/out ur help[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}tatsuya taught me to be thoughtful even when im not around ppl =)[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maya really trusts me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we're growing closer...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Hermit Social Link reached its maximum level! You can now fuse {f 0 1 35}Arahabaki{f 0 1 27}, the aboriginal god![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}i drew something in the sand for u[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}check the ground once i log off, k? :3[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}its kinda embarrassing, but i worked hard on it~[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}if u upload a screenie to ur cellphone, u can keep it always! ^^[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}i dun ever cry during romance movies but my eyes'll be red tonite... T_T[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}remember, lets think positive! ...gg, tatsu. thx 4 everything[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maya's player signed off...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I looked at the area where[n]Maya was standing.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A message is written in the sand...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}i ＜--read downward!![n]luv[n]u[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I sent the screencap to my phone.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After taking a moment to reminisce on my[n]memories with Maya, I logged off the game.[n]{f 1 1}
